title: Roger is My Copilot
headline: Because Who Needs Jesus When You Have Roger?
caption:
Channel your inner Ted Striker and let everyone know that Roger's flying this thing. If you're a fan of Airplane! or just appreciate the absurdity, grab yours here: https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/roger+is+my+copilot?idea=5d8e158b1361511e3eb8ed92 Save this one for later.

#Airplane #Roger #80sComedy #KareemAbdulJabbar
alt_text: T-shirt featuring 'Roger is My Copilot' with a nod to Airplane!
